label: Book Order Entry
description: Full trade booking workflow in one widget: execution mode toggle (live/record-only/DeFi), category tabs, instrument/venue/side/qty/price, collapsible algo config, collapsible record-only fields, inline preview/compliance panel, and submit. State machine: idle → preview → submitting → success/error.

0.7.note: Idle state renders full form with all defaults. Category tabs and execution-mode toggle always visible.

0.8.note: errorMessage from context renders inline error banner in preview/error states.

l0.notes: All L0 checks pass. Merged from book-order-form + book-algo-config + book-record-details + book-preview-compliance (WU-1, 2026-04-22).

1.3.note: orgId from scope gates canPreview / canExecute.

1.4.note: clientId from scope displayed in preview summary.

1.5.note: strategyId from scope gates execution mode label and compliance result.

1.6.note: Empty scope shows disabled state on submit.

1.7.note: BOOK_ALGO_OPTIONS and BOOK_VENUES_BY_CATEGORY from lib/config/services/trading.config. DEFI_* from lib/config/services/defi.config.

3.1.note: Live mode: submit enabled when canExecute. Batch mode: submit disabled.

3.5.note: Record-only executionMode shows counterparty/sourceReference/fee fields via CollapsibleSection.

l3.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 required.

4.1.note: Preview button, Edit button, Confirm/Submit button, error Retry button — all wired. Algo-config and record-details collapsibles open/close. State machine transitions: idle → preview (handlePreview), preview → idle (setOrderState('idle')), preview → submitting (handleSubmit).

4.6.note: canPreview and canExecute from useMemo in context.

5.1.note: Category tabs: Spot/Perp/Futures/Options/DeFi/Record-Only. Venues per category from BOOK_VENUES_BY_CATEGORY. DeFi path shows instruction-type + algo + slippage. Algo config shows all BOOK_ALGO_OPTIONS with dynamic param fields.

7.3.note: 716 lines — above 500-line soft limit but justified by merged workflow state machine. Single export function, no individual function exceeds 200 lines.

7.4.note: BookOrderEntryWidget PascalCase, useBookTradeData hook useCamelCase, file kebab-case. CLEAN.

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function. CLEAN.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file. All derived state in context. CLEAN.

l7.notes: L7 pass. Line count exceeds soft limit — expected for a merged 4-widget workflow.

8.1.note: Uses text-micro/text-nano tokens, no arbitrary text-[Xpx]. CLEAN.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Input, Select, Tabs, Card, Badge, CollapsibleSection, Spinner, KpiStrip primitives. CLEAN.

8.4.note: Labels present on all form fields. Human keyboard nav required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Merged host widget — the four previously fragmented booking workflow widgets are now consolidated here. book-trade-history and book-hierarchy-bar remain independent (separate data view and scope bar respectively).

relationships.notes: Merged from 4 co-dependent widgets (WU-1, 2026-04-22). State machine: idle → preview → submitting → success/error keyed off orderState from book-data-context. book-hierarchy-bar is the scope driver; this widget is the sole execution surface on the book tab.

dataContract.notes: Compliance check (complianceResult) is mock-simulated in context. Live path requires compliance service endpoint.

gaps: Compliance service endpoint not wired (mock only)
Record-only fee field validation not enforced client-side
coverage.notes: Primary execution widget for the book tab. Covers all category tabs including DeFi instruction/algo path.

knownIssues: 716 lines — above 500-line soft limit; acceptable for merged workflow
Compliance check is mock-simulated; live compliance service integration pending
